FMCP.Settings.ServerHost.Name: MCP Server Host
FMCP.Settings.ServerHost.Hint: Address of the MCP server (e.g. foundry.mydomain.com or 192.168.1.100)
FMCP.Settings.ServerPort.Name: MCP Server Port
FMCP.Settings.ServerPort.Hint: HTTP/WebSocket port of the MCP server (e.g. 3001)
FMCP.Settings.UseSSL.Name: Use SSL (WSS)
FMCP.Settings.UseSSL.Hint: Enable to use a secure connection (wss://). Required if Foundry is served over HTTPS.
FMCP.Settings.ApiKey.Name: WebSocket API Key
FMCP.Settings.ApiKey.Hint: Secret key to secure the WebSocket connection (must match WS_API_KEY on the server). Leave empty if not configured.
FMCP.Notifications.Connected: Foundry MCP: Connected to MCP server.
FMCP.Notifications.Disconnected: Foundry MCP: Disconnected from MCP server.
FMCP.Notifications.Failed: Foundry MCP: Could not connect to MCP server after {max} attempts.
FMCP.Notifications.GMOnly: Foundry MCP: This module is restricted to the GM.
